    More info
    eBird
     1 Holyrood Park (Janet Davis) "Accipiter suddenly dove into brush after prey along nearby brushy hillside as I watched at fairly close range. Unsuccessful. Flew out with no prey and flew to top of ridge and perched in small tree. Moltin[...]"
